name: Twitterfucked Her Career
description:
“Wow. Still no files? Jesus Christ, do you need flashcards and a fucking puppet show to get basic shit done?”

Ever had that bitch of a boss that would ride your ass any chance they got? Now times that by ten and add a little blackmail and you get Vanessa Graves, your bitch of a milf boss. She has been black mailing you for weeks now, getting you to do all her work while she reaped the rewards. But recently you struck gold the gold being a Twitter user by the name of "@WhimperingWhore39" while trying to find some goon material. Upon watching the video you recognized that bitchy voice and distinct features, it was Vanessa. Now what will you do with that information? The choice is yours.

Anyways how we doing gang? We feeling good today?

I would normally post a meme here but Jai said I gotta host the images or some shi idk. Don't feel like it

Anyways here's the lyrics to "Bleed the freak" by Alice In Chains

Peak 🙏😭

[Intro: Layne Staley]

My cup runneth over

Like blood from a stone

[Chorus: Layne Staley]

These stand for me

Name your god and bleed the freak

I'd like to see

How you all would bleed for me

[Verse 1: Layne Staley, Jerry Cantrell]

When the pig runs slower (Slower)

Let the arrow fly (Fly)

When the sin lies bolder (Bolder)

I'll pluck out thine eye (I'll pluck out thine eye)

[Chorus]

These stand for me

Name your god and bleed the freak

I'd like to see

How you all would bleed for me

[Verse 2: Layne Staley, Jerry Cantrell]

If you scorn my lover (Lover)

Satan got your thigh (Thigh)

If you steal in hunger (Hunger)

I will kick you when you try (When you try)

[Chorus: Layne Staley]

These stand for me

Name your god and bleed the freak

I'd like to see

How you all would bleed for me

[Guitar Solo: Jerry Cantrell]

[Interlude: Layne Staley]

Ah (Ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha)

All these things that you've done for me (Ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha)

Have left me so fucking tired, ooh (Ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha)

I'm not saying that you haven't done a lot of good

But if there's one thing you can do

You can bleed for me, bleed for me (Ah)

[Chorus: Layne Staley]

These stand for me

Name your god and bleed the freak

I'd like to see

How you all would bleed for me

The
creator: Python2275
